Shipment & Container Tracking

Select your booking type from Ocean, Air, Less-than-container-load (LCL) or Parcel and enter your tracking number to view full tracking details.

Container number is made of 4 letters and 7 digits.
Bill of Lading number consists of 9 characters.

Track
Bill of Lading number
268589857
From
ROTTERDAM
To
BUSAN
BSIU3499689
|
20' Dry Standard
Last updated: 9 days ago
Vessel departure • ROTTERDAM, NETHERLANDS • 04 Apr 2026

Note: All times are given in local time, unless otherwise stated.

Rotterdam
Star Container Services MVII
Gate out Empty
26 Mar 2026 13:18

ROTTERDAM
APM 2 TERMINAL MAASVLAKTE II
Gate in
01 Apr 2026 11:23

Load on MONACO MAERSK / 614E
03 Apr 2026 08:16

Vessel departure (MONACO MAERSK / 614E)
04 Apr 2026 20:18

SHANGHAI
YANGSHAN SGH GUANDONG TERMINAL
Vessel arrival (MONACO MAERSK / 620W)
18 May 2026 09:00

Vessel departure (TSINGTAO EXPRESS / 620E)
21 May 2026 05:00

23 May 2026 15:00
